title: Weekly Macro Brief
_note: DRAFT — market-dependent. Fill every [..] with real values on publish day, then set ready=true. Never invent prices.
body:
📅 Weekly Macro Brief

This week the market is reacting to [dominant macro theme — e.g. rate decision / CPI print], and that's setting the tone for risk assets.

What moved:
• BTC held around [BTC price on publish day] after [recent move] — momentum is [neutral/cooling/building].
• ETH tracked BTC closely; the [ETH/BTC ratio on publish day] tells us where rotation is leaning.
• Sentiment: [funding/positioning read] — crowds are leaning [long/short], which is worth noting, not chasing.

What we're watching this week:
• [support level] and [resistance level] on BTC as the lines that matter.
• [macro event + date] — volatility tends to cluster around it.
• Whether [BTC dominance / altseason signal] keeps trending.

We don't predict the week. We map it, then react to what actually prints.

#MacroBrief
